title: GPS location
excerpt:
Hello, 
We have users who work in the field. 
I have two requirements: 

How can they use the location column to pin the current GPS location?
How can they manually input the GPS location on the location column?

posts.author: TheKribus (Michael Kribus)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

We have users who work in the field.
I have two requirements:

  1. How can they use the location column to pin the current GPS location?
  2. How can they manually input the GPS location on the location column?

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: Which Product(s) do you have? I think Service has something like that, but we don’t have that product.

posts.author: Karmon (Karen)
posts.cookedHtml:
For the GPS location, you can typically use the location column to capture the current GPS coordinates via a button or feature that fetches the user’s location.

For manual input, you could allow users to enter the latitude and longitude directly in the location column. Just make sure to validate the input format to ensure accuracy.

posts.author: TheKribus (Michael Kribus)
posts.cookedHtml: Have you tried that? there is no way to input LAT and LON - What are you talking about?
